sentences.text: Thank you for calling M P G residential. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time or stay on the line to be connected to the next available representative. Please hold while I try to connect you. Thank you for calling Lou minera asset management. We are currently unavailable to take your call. Please leave a message after the beep or contact us during business hours Monday through Friday between eight, AM and five PM you can also visit us online at W W W dot Bloom and era. C O dot. Com or email us at info at luminary S C O dot. Com to submit a maintenance request, please hang up and dial one eight hundred nine zero five one eight zero three thank you.

Hello, this message is for Oscar. This is Austin calling with rentable just calling in regards to and eleven AM call we had set up for today. I'll go ahead and just give me a call or email back and you have a few moments. My number is six zero eight nine two one two four one nine again, this is Austin with rental six zero eight nine two one two four one nine or my email Austin U S T I N at rentable R E N T a B L E dot C zero. Thank you.
